{{Infobox character
| name = Hall
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = the Ghost
| affiliations = Abidan
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Hall, whose full name is [[Hallister Halloway]], is a one-star [[Ghost]]. He serves as a guide for individuals traveling from lower worlds, leading them through portals into the [[Way]] toward locations where their skills are required. While he attempts to offer encouragement and practical advice to those following him, he can also appear nervous or distracted by threats. Hall is associated with an organization dedicated to investigating the fundamental mechanics of reality, and he possesses a deep curiosity regarding such knowledge. He has also expressed regret over being unable to repair certain elements of the [[void]] membrane.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hallister Halloway]], commonly referred to by the nickname Hall, is a young [[Abidan]] known as [[the Ghost]]. He is a young [[Ghost]] who materializes from a shadow. In his role as a leader, he is recognized for having failed his disciples.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hall]] is a nickname for [[Hallister Halloway]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hall]] is a young [[Ghost]] who materializes from a shadow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hall]] is known as [[the Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hall]] is a young [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hall]] is a leader who failed his disciples.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Abidan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
